hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Set up variables for flowerCenterX, flowerCenterY, and flowerRadius before the loop

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: On each iteration, decrease flowerCenterY by 1 and increase flowerRadius by 0.4

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Calculate all other measurements based on the flower center and radius

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The stem height is groundTop - flowerCenterY

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Remember to update all variables before drawing each frame
